message:
feat(runtime): add CLIENT LIST TYPE/ID filtering and fail-close TRACKING/CACHING

CLIENT LIST:
- Implement TYPE filtering (NORMAL|MASTER|REPLICA|PUBSUB) for
  selective client enumeration
- Implement ID filtering for specific client lookup
- Add strict arity validation for CLIENT INFO

CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING:
- Change from returning OK to returning explicit "not supported"
  errors (fail-closed pattern for better conformance)

Add filter validation and fail-closed behavior tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
